description_long: This is a male adult figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms slightly extended at the sides. He is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted t-shirt and straight-cut jeans, paired with casual low-top sneakers. The figure has a full beard and a bald head, with defined facial features and a neutral expression. The hands are relaxed, with fingers naturally spread, and the overall posture is balanced and symmetrical. The clothing fits closely to the body, showing the contours of the arms and legs. The materials and textures suggest a realistic representation suitable for urban environments.
description: A standing adult male with a muscular build, wearing a fitted t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers, with a bald head and full beard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full front of the t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, beard, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, beard, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and straight-cut jeans
